keyPoints: Official Cash Flow is still legacy roznamcha and has not changed.
Preview now follows Nadeem-approved rules Q4=A, Q5=C, Q7=B.
DIN CHINA and DIN BRIDAL do not match legacy because the approved finance basis intentionally differs from legacy presentation.
DIN COUTURE matches exactly — good candidate for review.
No data, flags, migrations, or production behavior was changed in this phase.
Operator must choose Option A, B, C, or D in writing before sign-off or loader swap.

din-china.primaryReason: Q5 transfer exclusion vs legacy gross transfers

din-bridal.primaryReason: Q4 opening summary-only vs legacy period cash-in
